mapper.select: SELECT B.SITE_CD AS siteCd , B.BRD_ID AS brdId , B.BRD_SE AS brdSe , B.BRD_NM AS brdNm , B.BRD_DESC AS brdDesc , B.ORD AS ord , B.USE_YN AS useYn , B.LGN_USER_USE_YN AS lgnUserUseYn , B.WRTR_PSN_QRY_YN AS wrtrPsnQryYn , B.PWD_USE_YN AS pwdUseYn , B.FILE_USE_YN AS fileUseYn , B.CMT_USE_YN AS cmtUseYn , A.WRT_AUTH_CD AS wrtAuthCd , A.QRY_AUTH_CD AS qryAuthCd , A.CMT_AUTH_CD AS cmtAuthCd , TO_CHAR(B.CRT_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS crtAt , TO_CHAR(B.UPD_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS updAt FROM CMS_BRD B LEFT JOIN CMS_BRD_AUTH A ON A.BRD_ID = B.BRD_ID AND A.SITE_CD = B.SITE_CD WHERE B.SITE_CD = #{siteCd} AND B.BRD_ID = #{brdId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO CMS_BRD ( SITE_CD , BRD_ID , BRD_SE , BRD_NM , BRD_DESC , ORD , USE_YN , LGN_USER_USE_YN , WRTR_PSN_QRY_YN , PWD_USE_YN , FILE_USE_YN , CMT_USE_YN , ) VALUES ( #{siteCd} , #{brdId} , #{brdSe} , #{brdNm} , #{brdDesc} , #{ord} , NVL(#{useYn}, 'Y') , NVL(#{lgnUserUseYn}, 'N') , NVL(#{wrtrPsnQryYn}, 'N') , NVL(#{pwdUseYn}, 'N') , NVL(#{fileUseYn}, 'N') , NVL(#{cmtUseYn}, 'N') , )
